creator: nikola.lecic@anthesphoria.net
text:
Five notes to the committer:

1. I think that the name of this port is no longer appropriate since it now
   supports Unicode 5.1, not 5. I posted a question about it on ports@
   (http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2009-June/055546.html)
   but, having received no answer, I submitted this PR leaving an old name.
   If you think the port should be renamed, I will send another PR.
   
2. This port IS NO LONGER RESTRICTED, so the pkg-message and pkg-descr are
   changed. The source is now distributed under X11-style licence
   (http://scripts.sil.org/X11License), so please remove the entry from
   /usr/ports/LEGAL.
   
3. files/patch-IPAUni11.kmn will be left empty after applying this patch.

4. files/patch-IPAUni12.kmn will be created after it.

5. COMMENT is changed.

From the release notes:

* This version includes support for Unicode 5.1 codepoints for upstep,
  downstep, hooked v (bilabial flap) and hooked w, i.e. F25F>2C71,
  F19C>A71B, F19D>A71C, F21A>2C73.
